name: Ulana Nasib
ai_summary: Ulana Nasib is a 21-year-old college student with experience as a home caregiver for children ages 10-13, including a child with disabilities. She is available part-time on Tuesdays through Thursdays in Salt Lake City, UT, and uses listening and distraction to de-escalate conflicts.

transcripts.q3:
My name is Mulan and asleep and I'm 21 year old college student and I have worked as a wood home care but not daycare. I've worked as a home caregiver with the with with 10 and 13 years old.
 Child with disabilities. And I really enjoy working with kids because I just feel like just helping them learn and overcome themselves and the little happiness that brings to their faces. Just makes me happy and want to work more with them.
transcripts.q4: I live in Salt Lake City, Utah in Salt Lake County?
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for part-time for the moment. So my availability schedule and days to work on Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday, those days.
transcripts.q6:
Before I say anything or do anything, I listened to both kids toys and see what's the problem. And once I find out what side is the wrong side coming from then instead of
 Punishing the kids and I just changed the topic to gonna distract them from the entire fights and stuff and to deescalate the conflicts between them.
transcripts.q7: I think I'll be a great teacher up to date because I'll get to helping shape young minds and Foster their development and witness their growth firsthand. And I think this is the only opportunity to make a real difference in their lives while they're young.
